title: Mouthwatering Yeasty Greek Feta Cheese Revithia
description: A traditional Greek dish featuring cubed feta cheese in a yeasty revithia form, wrapped in pandan leaves and glazed to perfection, this recipe is low-fat-friendly and perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine yeast and 1 cup of warm water, stirring to dissolve the yeast.
Add the cubed feta cheese, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to the bowl, mixing well to combine.
Knead the mixture for 5 minutes until it forms a smooth, elastic dough.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape each piece into a small ball.
Wrap each ball in a pandan leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the wrapped revithia in a large steamer basket, leaving space between each piece for even cooking.
Steam the revithia over boiling water for 15 minutes, or until cooked through and slightly puffed.
While the revithia are cooking, prepare the glaze by mixing the honey with 1 tablespoon of water in a small bowl.
Remove the revithia from the steamer and brush with the honey glaze.
Serve the revithia warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
